chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | February 28, 2025 - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter provides updates and information for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It includes announcements about events, opportunities, and resources relevant to the academic and professional development of students.

The newsletter covers various categories such as events, job opportunities, and academic deadlines. It aims to keep students informed about important dates and activities within the department. Students are encouraged to regularly check the newsletter for the latest news and announcements.

Open Faculty Positions are announced in the newsletter, highlighting opportunities for faculty roles within the EECS department. This section informs students and potential candidates about available positions and application procedures. It serves as a resource for those interested in academic careers at Berkeley.
